creator: vs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hm, in the port's Makefile, I find:

post-configure:
         @${PERL} -pi -e "s=distclean::=distclean:=g" ${WRKSRC}/Makefile

Can you please send the output of:
- cd /usr/ports/print/xdvi && make -V PERL
- <perl_above> -v

As a workaround, could you please test setting USE_REINPLACE=yes and
replace ${PERL} with ${REINPLACE_CMD} (and drop the flags "-pi").

Maybe either your perl is botched or this doesn't work for some setups,
so maybe REINPLACE or an explicit patch will do...

Regards,
   Volker
